title: boechera selbyi
intro: Boechera selbyi, also known as Selby's rockcress, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Boechera selbyi include its potential to protect against oxidative stress, inflammation, and cell damage, making it a promising candidate for the treatment of various diseases. Herbal preparations of Boechera selbyi can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
